envelopes.label: handoff
envelopes.compactText:
@cl1 s=ho i=review.security ch=i md=ro au=m fb=rj rs=n sz=st mx=500
sum="Review src/core/codec.ts for transport safety before release."
f="Preserve {{PROJECT_ID}} exactly."
f="Preserve GPT-5.4 exactly."
f="The module handles all inbound byte streams from external agents."
ask="Return severity-ordered findings only."
role=rv
tgt=fx
sc=transport,validation
cls=fp
cls=ph
cls=mo
cls=cmd
#n=385

envelopes.label: handoff
envelopes.compactText: @cl1 s=ho i=review.security mx=500 ; sum="Review src/core/codec.ts for transport safety before release." ; f="Preserve {{PROJECT_ID}} exactly." ; f="Preserve GPT-5.4 exactly." ; f="The module handles all inbound byte streams from external agents." ; ask="Return severity-ordered findings only." ; role=rv ; tgt=fx ; sc=transport,validation ; cls=fp ; cls=ph ; cls=mo ; cls=cmd ; tok=src/core/codec.ts ; tok="{{PROJECT_ID}}" ; tok=GPT-5.4 ; tok="npm test" ; #n=454

envelopes.label: digest
envelopes.compactText:
@cl1 s=dg i=summarize.session ch=i md=ad au=o fb=vb rs=te sz=st mx=500
sum="Summarize the latest internal session state for operator review."
f="npm test has not run in this session."
f="$CI was unset during the last pipeline run."
f="Three pending security checks remain."
ask="Render a compact operator digest with actionable items."
win=ss
st=wr
met=pendingChecks:3,sessionMinutes:47,tokenBudgetUsed:1420
cls=cmd
cls=env
#n=423

envelopes.label: memory
envelopes.compactText:
@cl1 s=me i=memory.capture ch=i md=ad au=m fb=rj rs=nr sz=st mx=500
sum="Capture a stable product fact for future sessions."
f="Ceeline v1 uses a canonical JSON envelope."

f="The compact dialect supports three density levels."
ask="Store a compact durable fact entry."
mk=fa
dur=ps
cit=https://ceeline.dev/spec,docs/ceeline-language-spec-v1.md
cls=url

envelopes.label: reflection
envelopes.compactText:
@cl1 s=rf i=reflect.confidence ch=i md=ro au=m fb=rj rs=n sz=st mx=500
sum="Self-critique of the validation pipeline coverage."
f="Edge case for empty payload.facts is not tested."
f="Confidence in handoff validation is high."
f="Confidence in digest metric parsing is moderate."
ask="Identify the lowest-confidence validation path."
rty=cc
cnf=0.72
rev="Add validation configuration tests for empty payload arrays."
cls=cs
#n=423
